What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A hand pours red powder from a green spoon onto chopped vegetables in a white pot, while a woman in a pink cardigan reaches for green onions on a wooden cutting board next to a tablet. White crumbled cheese is added to penne pasta mixed with chicken and spinach in a black frying pan, and red chili peppers are visible in a close-up.

Describe the sequence of kitchen activities and ingredient preparations shown throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, salt and pepper grinders sit on a wooden surface; at 4s, salt spills from a shaker onto a black surface; at 8s, a hand pours red spice from a green spoon onto vegetables; at 12s, a woman reaches for green onions near a tablet; at 16s, pasta with chicken and cheese is shown in a frying pan.
